message:
feat(fwc): add CommandAvailability enum and CommandEnvelope for distinct workflow output semantics

Introduces a typed vocabulary for command outcomes: LiveRuntime,
OfflineArtifact, Unsupported, Planned, Unavailable, Denied, and
Unknown. Each variant carries exit-code mapping, human-readable
explanation, recoverability flag, and contextual next-action guidance.

CommandEnvelope wraps availability + command name and can inject
structured availability metadata into JSON payloads. Wired into
missing_host_dispatch and conflicting_catalog_mode_dispatch as
integration examples.

32 new tests covering serde round-trips, exit codes, next-action
generation, envelope construction, and payload injection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
